caveat: program_sha256 includes a generated_at timestamp so it is NOT byte-stable across regenerations; the program CONTENT (rows, budgets, families, params) and the trial SCIENCE are deterministic + stable. Recommend hashing program content excluding timestamp for a stable generation identity.

verdict: G0 PASS - 32-trial geometry science reproduces deterministically from the frozen commit
